cause_ground: 14 M.R.S. § 6002(1)(B) (nuisance and violation of law regarding the tenancy)
cause_description: Pat G. Doe 28 and June 4, 2026, repeated late-night disturbances and the storage of inoperable vehicles on the premises in violation of the municipal ordinance, after written warnings dated May 1 and May 20, 2026
